subject: [PATCH v3 18/28] nfsd: add tracepoint to dir_event handler

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds a tracepoint to the dir_event handler in the NFS server (nfsd) code, providing visibility into the fsnotify handlers. The added tracepoint is called nfsd_handle_dir_event and it captures information about directory events, including the inode number, device number, and file system mask. This allows developers to monitor and debug directory-related operations in the NFS server.
